decontamination_notes: Real feature from redis/redis-py PR #4081, merged 2026-05-27, after model training cutoffs. Three-way distinction (omitted / explicit None / value) for client-identification metadata via a SENTINEL, threaded through DriverInfo (defaults, formatted_name) and resolve_driver_info across the client config surface (12 files in the PR). Repo sliced at base commit; MIT LICENSE preserved. redis-py has no required runtime deps on Python 3.12 (async-timeout only for <3.11.3), so this runs in the base sandbox image with PYTHONPATH=. The behavioral contract is unit-testable at the DriverInfo/resolve_driver_info level without a live Redis server.
